testcase.classname: queue pipeline index addEventJob adds an ingest job to the queue with the provided data
testcase.name: queue pipeline index addEventJob adds an ingest job to the queue with the provided data

testcase.classname: queue pipeline index addEventJob bubbles up errors if eventQueue.add rejects
testcase.name: queue pipeline index addEventJob bubbles up errors if eventQueue.add rejects

testcase.classname: queue pipeline index createEventWorker creates a Worker bound to event-ingest with the given processor and shared connection
testcase.name: queue pipeline index createEventWorker creates a Worker bound to event-ingest with the given processor and shared connection

testcase.classname: queue pipeline index createEventWorker passes the same Redis connection instance used by the queue
testcase.name: queue pipeline index createEventWorker passes the same Redis connection instance used by the queue

testcase.classname: queue pipeline index createEventWorker returns distinct worker handles for multiple processors
testcase.name: queue pipeline index createEventWorker returns distinct worker handles for multiple processors

testcase.classname: queue pipeline index closeQueueConnections closes workers, queue, and redis connection
testcase.name: queue pipeline index closeQueueConnections closes workers, queue, and redis connection

testcase.classname: CancelMembershipUseCase should return success when membership is cancelled successfully
testcase.name: CancelMembershipUseCase should return success when membership is cancelled successfully

testcase.classname: CancelMembershipUseCase should return error when membership cancellation fails with an Error object
testcase.name: CancelMembershipUseCase should return error when membership cancellation fails with an Error object

testcase.classname: CancelMembershipUseCase should return default error message when membership cancellation fails with a non-Error object
testcase.name: CancelMembershipUseCase should return default error message when membership cancellation fails with a non-Error object

testcase.classname: useCouncil hook should pass enabled: true when authenticated
testcase.name: useCouncil hook should pass enabled: true when authenticated

testcase.classname: useCouncil hook should pass enabled: false when not authenticated
testcase.name: useCouncil hook should pass enabled: false when not authenticated

testcase.classname: useCouncil hook should expose council, councilId, lgaCode from LGA context
testcase.name: useCouncil hook should expose council, councilId, lgaCode from LGA context

testcase.classname: useCouncil hook should include the correct query key with city, postcode, and state
testcase.name: useCouncil hook should include the correct query key with city, postcode, and state

testcase.classname: useRole hook should return default user role and false flags when not authenticated
testcase.name: useRole hook should return default user role and false flags when not authenticated

testcase.classname: useRole hook should handle loading state
testcase.name: useRole hook should handle loading state

testcase.classname: useRole hook should identify a regular authenticated user
testcase.name: useRole hook should identify a regular authenticated user

testcase.classname: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= organizer
testcase.name: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= organizer

testcase.classname: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= cityAdmin
testcase.name: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= cityAdmin

testcase.classname: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= moderator
testcase.name: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= moderator

testcase.classname: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= admin
testcase.name: useRole hook should correctly identify rank >= admin

testcase.classname: useRole hook hasRole should return true for exact role matches
testcase.name: useRole hook hasRole should return true for exact role matches

testcase.classname: useRole hook hasRole should return false if not authenticated
testcase.name: useRole hook hasRole should return false if not authenticated

testcase.classname: useRole hook hasMinRole should correctly compare ranks
testcase.name: useRole hook hasMinRole should correctly compare ranks

testcase.classname: useRole hook hasMinRole should return false if not authenticated
testcase.name: useRole hook hasMinRole should return false if not authenticated

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade Initial State should initialize with expected defaults
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade Initial State should initialize with expected defaults

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade Initial State should compute isPlus correctly when membership data exists
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade Initial State should compute isPlus correctly when membership data exists

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade Initial State should update billing period and pricing
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade Initial State should update billing period and pricing

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade Authentication requirements should require login for subscribe
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade Authentication requirements should require login for subscribe

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade Authentication requirements should silently return if executing cancel when not logged in
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade Authentication requirements should silently return if executing cancel when not logged in

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle dev_mode_success response
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle dev_mode_success response

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle already_active response
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle already_active response

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle error response
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle error response

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle thrown error
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle thrown error

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle checkout_required response and poll for updates
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeSubscribe should handle checkout_required response and poll for updates

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeCancel should display confirmation dialog and cancel membership
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeCancel should display confirmation dialog and cancel membership

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeCancel should handle cancel failure from use case
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeCancel should handle cancel failure from use case

testcase.classname: useMembershipUpgrade executeCancel should handle thrown error during cancellation
testcase.name: useMembershipUpgrade executeCancel should handle thrown error during cancellation

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext hydrates state from AsyncStorage on mount
testcase.name: OnboardingContext hydrates state from AsyncStorage on mount

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext uses expected default state shape when no persisted data exists
testcase.name: OnboardingContext uses expected default state shape when no persisted data exists

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext does not parse storage payload when getItem returns an empty string
testcase.name: OnboardingContext does not parse storage payload when getItem returns an empty string

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext updates location and persists the new value
testcase.name: OnboardingContext updates location and persists the new value

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext resets onboarding state and removes persisted storage
testcase.name: OnboardingContext resets onboarding state and removes persisted storage

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext updates key profile fields via setters and onboarding completion toggles
testcase.name: OnboardingContext updates key profile fields via setters and onboarding completion toggles

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext updates all location and identity setters with persisted state
testcase.name: OnboardingContext updates all location and identity setters with persisted state

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext warns in dev when persistence fails
testcase.name: OnboardingContext warns in dev when persistence fails

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext does not warn in production mode when persistence fails
testcase.name: OnboardingContext does not warn in production mode when persistence fails

testcase.classname: OnboardingContext throws a helpful error when hook is used outside provider
